headline: Dell’s Doudna Supercomputer Role And What It May Mean For Investors
summary: Dell Technologies (NYSE:DELL) is partnering with the U.S. Department of Energy and NVIDIA on the new Doudna supercomputer. The system is designed to accelerate U.S. scientific discovery using AI and high performance computing. Doudna is expected to deliver more than ten times the performance of current leading systems. The project marks a new public private initiative for Dell beyond its commercial AI infrastructure work. For you as an investor, this project sits at the intersection of AI...
